blended.narrative: Ragged Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
